name: WP-S13-pii-step-state: minors' PII out of remaining Inngest step returns + event payloads
description: Extend WI-578's landed pattern (WP-W3-pii-step-state, PR #933; pii-scrub.ts service) to the three sites it did not cover. Findings: F-028 (minor's full session transcript memoized in step return state — REMAINING LEGS after activation scan: auto-file-session 'fetch-transcript' step and topic-probe-extract 'load-transcript' step; the freeform-filing leg is ALREADY FIXED (transcript local to step closure, PII-egress comment) — replicate that closure pattern, do not re-fix it) · F-091 (inferred learner signals memoized in topic-probe-extract 'extract-signals' step return) · F-090 (user feedback free-text + support email carried in app/feedback.delivery_failed event payload — strip to IDs, rehydrate in the consumer). Read PR #933's diff for the sanctioned pattern BEFORE designing. Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label security-pii-inngest).
acceptanceCriteria: No session transcript or inferred-signal content serialized into Inngest step returns in auto-file-session / topic-probe-extract (transcripts local to step closures, DB-rehydrated); feedback.delivery_failed payload carries identifiers only; guard/regression test per finding (pii-scrub.guard.test.ts pattern); existing function behavior unchanged (tests green).
riskImpact: M / minors'-PII handling — mechanical but supervision: PII changes reviewed per charter.
bodyText:
Bundle brief — WP-S13-pii-step-state
Rationale
WI-578 (WP-W3-pii-step-state, PR #933) landed the sanctioned fix pattern for minors'-PII egress into Inngest's third-party state store, but its audited finding set (F-075/085–089) did not cover three sites surfaced by the same 2026-05-29 full audit under label security-pii-inngest. This WP extends the landed pattern to those remaining sites. PII of minors persisted in memoized step returns or event payloads is durable egress to a third-party store — P1 per the audit.
Strategy
Extend, never reinvent: reuse the WI-578 mechanisms — step-closure rehydration (fetch + format inside the consuming step via reference, e.g. sessionId), the pii-scrub.ts service, and the pii-scrub.guard.test.ts guard-test pattern. The executor MUST read PR #933's diff before designing. The freeform-filing leg of F-028 is ALREADY FIXED (transcript local to the retry-filing step closure, explicit PII-egress comment at freeform-filing.ts:170-172) — replicate that closure pattern, do not re-fix it.
Scope
In: the three findings below (4 child items; F-028 has two legs). Out: F-090/F-094/F-162/F-174's siblings in WI-666 (config-correctness), anything already fixed by PR #933, and the chronic Deploy-workflow staging failure (WI-664).
Findings table
Bundle Acceptance Criteria
No session-transcript or inferred-signal content serialized into any Inngest step return in auto-file-session / topic-probe-extract (content local to step closures, DB-rehydrated downstream).
app/feedback.delivery_failed payload carries identifiers only; the consumer rehydrates free-text + email from the DB.
Guard/regression test per finding following the pii-scrub.guard.test.ts pattern; break tests demonstrated red against pre-fix code.
Existing function behavior unchanged — full related test suites green; one PR for the WP.
